'''Scod''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] living on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. A member of a cleaning crew reporting to [[Jakaitis]], [[Goure Conor]] impersonated him in order to successfully infiltrate the [[Bakur Memorial Building|Bakuran Senate Complex]] along with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
